title: Rep's Everything Mod
description: A little bit of everything. From Repook's Modding Series On YT.
body:
From exotic foods to earth shaking mobs, this mod has a little bit of everything. It was originally made as a Youtube series and is now published on Modrinth.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YwHxFEhwqeg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Mod-Dev Playlist: [https://youtu.be/YwHxFEhwqeg](https://youtu.be/YwHxFEhwqeg)



### SPOILER FOR ALL THE ADDITIONS:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

# Golden Foods:

Golden Beetroot: Gives Haste and Absorption

Golden Sweet Berries: Gives Speed and Absorption

Golden Rotten Flesh: Gives Absorption

# Cold Enchants: Deals Freezing Damage.

Frigid Strike(For Swords/Axes)

Frost(For Bows) 

Traditional Lantern

Lucky Cat

Phantom Boots: Gives Slow Falling when in air.

# Eroded Stuff

Eroded Mob: Drops eroded fragments which can be used
for eroded shield,haste potion, and eroded bricks.

Eroded Shield: When Shift-Right-Clicked With this in your inventory, you will get launched in the direction you are facing.

Eroded Temple: Generates in mangrove swamp and is where the eroded spawns. It is built out of Eroded Bricks and has many traps/loot.

# Straw Stuff
Straw Block: Has 8 layer types, purely decorative.

Scarecrow: Made with Straw Block, looks cool and can be used to scare away zombies.

Scarecrow House: Small structure with scarecrow, farm, and other goodies.

Crate Block: Nice looking block.


</details>
